data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interface elements are designed for easy, quick access.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable buttons and intuitive navigation paths.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices presented at once.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic menu designs and contextual menus.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures aesthetically pleasing designs which users perceive as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Modern UI with a clean color scheme and high-resolution imagery.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns user interface with user expectations by looking similar to other popular interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout with familiar icons and functions.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related elements together making them easier to distinguish.
data.technical_spec: Use of cards, shaded backgrounds to group related information.
